◆ USBPHY_TX_SYNC_MUX

#define USBPHY_TX_SYNC_MUX ( x)

SYNC_MUX - Sync MUX 0b0..Use normal functional HS TX dataslice path for USB_DP and USB_DM 0b1..Resync HS TX data in HS TX dataslice path for debug feature

◆ USBPHY_TX_SYNC_INVERT

#define USBPHY_TX_SYNC_INVERT ( x)

SYNC_INVERT - Sync Invert 0b0..Sync on the falling edge of the clock to the HS TX dataslice circuit 0b1..Sync on the rising edge of the clock to the HS TX dataslice circuit

◆ USBPHY_TX_EDGE_CTRL

#define USBPHY_TX_EDGE_CTRL ( x)

EDGE_CTRL - Edge Rate Control 0b000..0.5x pre-driver size 0b001..0.625x pre-driver size 0b010..0.75x pre-driver size 0b011..0.875x pre-driver size 0b100..1.0x pre-driver size (default) 0b101..1.125x pre-driver size 0b110..1.25x pre-driver size 0b111..1.375x pre-driver size

◆ USBPHY_DEBUG0_TX2RXCOUNT

#define USBPHY_DEBUG0_TX2RXCOUNT ( x)

TX2RXCOUNT - Set countdown delay value from Tx to Rx packets for debug 0b0000..Delay value of TX2RX counter is one 480 MHz clock 0b0001..Delay value of TX2RX counter is two 480 MHz clocks 0b0011..Delay value of TX2RX counter is three 480 MHz clocks 0b0111..Delay value of TX2RX counter is four 480 MHz clocks 0b1000..Delay value of TX2RX counter is eight 480 MHz clocks 0b1100..Delay value of TX2RX counter is seven 480 MHz clocks 0b1110..Delay value of TX2RX counter is six 480 MHz clocks 0b1111..Delay value of TX2RX counter is five 480 MHz clocks

◆ USBPHY_DEBUG1_DBG_ADDRESS

#define USBPHY_DEBUG1_DBG_ADDRESS ( x)

DBG_ADDRESS - Debug Address 0b0000..dbg_sq_cnt[5:0], dbg_rxerror_cnt[9:0], dbg_loop_back_fail[15:0] 0b0001..utmi_tx_data[15:0], utmi_rx_data[15:0] 0b0010..utmi_iddig, 7'd0, utmi_txvalidh, utmi_txvalid, 1'b0, utmi_termselect, utmi_xcvrselect[1:0], utmi_opmode[1:0], 8'd0, utmi_linestate[1:0], utmip_suspendm, utmi_rxvalidh, utmi_rxvalid, utmi_rxactive, utmi_rxerror, utmi_txready 0b0011..1'd0, dbg_bcnt_start_state[2:0], 2'd0, dbg_sq_unlock_state[2:0], 1'd0, dbg_bit_state[9:0], dbg_rx_state[3:0], dbg_unstuff_state[7:0] 0b0100..3'd0, dbg_byte_state[12:0], 2'd0,dbg_snd_state[13:0] 0b0101..4'd0, dbg_data_state[3:0], 2'd0, dbg_sync_state[5:0], 1'd0, dbg_prechg_state[2:0], 1'd0, dbg_shift_state[2:0], 3'd0, dbg_sof_state[4:0] 0b0110..21'd0, dbg_first_eop_state[2:0], dbg_eop_state[7:0] 0b0111..2'd0, dbg_first_data_state[1:0], dbg_fs_bit_state[3:0], 1'd0, dbg_fs_unstuff_state[2:0], 2'd0, dbg_load_state[1:0], 8'd0, dbg_fs_rx_state[3:0], 4'd0 0b1000..dbg_rx_sie_state[3:0], dbg_tx_sie_state[3:0], 14'd0, dbg_fs_shift_state[1:0], 1'd0, dbg_fs_tx_state[6:0]

◆ USBPHY_DEBUG1_TRIM_REFBIAS_VTRM_OVERRIDE

#define USBPHY_DEBUG1_TRIM_REFBIAS_VTRM_OVERRIDE ( x)

TRIM_REFBIAS_VTRM_OVERRIDE - Override enable for TBD 0b0..Use the TRIM_REFBIAS_VTRM 0b1..Use the USB2_REFBIAS_VTRM

◆ USBPHY_DEBUG1_ENTAILADJVD

#define USBPHY_DEBUG1_ENTAILADJVD ( x)

ENTAILADJVD - HS Rx squelch rise time delay trim bits 0b00..Squelch rising edge delay is design nominal 0b01..+20% delay compared to nominal 0b10..-20% delay compared to nominal 0b11..-40% delay compared to nominal

◆ USBPHY_DEBUG1_USB2_REFBIAS_VBGADJ

#define USBPHY_DEBUG1_USB2_REFBIAS_VBGADJ ( x)

USB2_REFBIAS_VBGADJ - Bandgap voltage adjustment 0b000..Design nominal band gap voltage; flattest temperature coefficient 0b001..~+10 mV compared to nominal 0b010..~+20 mV compared to nominal 0b011..~+30 mV compared to nominal; most positive temperature coefficient 0b100..~-10 mV compared to nominal 0b101..~-20 mV compared to nominal 0b110..~-30 mV compared to nominal 0b111..~-40 mV compared to nominal; most negative temperature coefficient

◆ USBPHY_IP_POWER_CONTROL_SUSPEND_OPTION

#define USBPHY_IP_POWER_CONTROL_SUSPEND_OPTION ( x)

POWER_CONTROL_SUSPEND_OPTION - Power Control Suspend Option

◆ USBPHY_IP_LONG_AUTORESUME_ENABLE

#define USBPHY_IP_LONG_AUTORESUME_ENABLE ( x)

LONG_AUTORESUME_ENABLE - Long autoresume enable 0b0..Autoresume signaling is approximately 320 slow clock periods 0b1..Autoresume signaling is approximately 540 slow clock periods

◆ USBPHY_IP_EN_USB_CLKS

#define USBPHY_IP_EN_USB_CLKS ( x)

EN_USB_CLKS - Debug bit for FS Rx recognition of sync start

◆ USBPHY_IP_ANALOG_TESTMODE

#define USBPHY_IP_ANALOG_TESTMODE ( x)

ANALOG_TESTMODE - Debug bit for HS Rx sampler clock gating 0b0..HS Rx sampler clocks gated by CTRL[CLKGATE] or Suspend state 0b1..HS Rx sampler clocks gated by CTRL[CLKGATE] only

◆ USBPHY_IP_TSTI_TX_DM

#define USBPHY_IP_TSTI_TX_DM ( x)

TSTI_TX_DM - Enable bit for selection of Suspend recognition method 0b0..Trigger using a signal based on the level of the UTMI_SUSPENDM signal 0b1..Trigger using a pulse generated from the entry into Suspend state (default)

◆ USBPHY_IP_TSTI_TX_DP

#define USBPHY_IP_TSTI_TX_DP ( x)

TSTI_TX_DP - Enable bit for Linestate after Resume fix 0b0..Allow SE0 line state during EOP at the end of Resume signaling 0b1..Hold K state line state during EOP at the end of Resume signaling

◆ USBPHY_IP_CP_SEL

#define USBPHY_IP_CP_SEL ( x)

CP_SEL - Enable bits for auto-clockgate set and auto-powerdown set functions 0b00..Enable both auto-clockgate set and auto-powerdown set 0b01..Enable auto-clockgate set and disable auto-powerdown set 0b10..Disable auto-clockgate set and enable auto-powerdown set 0b11..Disable both auto-clockgate set and auto-powerdown set

◆ USBPHY_IP_LFR_SEL

#define USBPHY_IP_LFR_SEL ( x)

LFR_SEL - Currently unused register bits

◆ USBPHY_IP_DIV_SEL

#define USBPHY_IP_DIV_SEL ( x)

DIV_SEL - Bit [1] is for HS Rx fix and Bit [0] is to force to remove termination in Mode 1. 0b0x..Enables the fix for HS Rx behavior near the packet end 0b1x..Disables the fix for HS Rx behavior near the packet end 0bx0..Force high-speed termination remove if opmode == 2'b01. 0bx1..Do not force high-speed termination remove if opmode == 2'b01.

MISC2_CONTROL0 - Miscellaneous Control 0b0..Power up PLL 0b1..Power down PLL

◆ USBPHY_PLL_SIC_PLL_EN_USB_CLKS

PLL_EN_USB_CLKS - PLL Multi-Phase Clock Outputs Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ USBPHY_PLL_SIC_HALF_LF

#define USBPHY_PLL_SIC_HALF_LF ( x)

HALF_LF - Halves the USB PLL loop filter resistance from the nominal value.

◆ USBPHY_PLL_SIC_DOUBLE_LF

#define USBPHY_PLL_SIC_DOUBLE_LF ( x)

DOUBLE_LF - Doubles the USB PLL loop filter resistance from the nominal value.

◆ USBPHY_PLL_SIC_HALF_CP

#define USBPHY_PLL_SIC_HALF_CP ( x)

HALF_CP - Halves the USB PLL charge pump current from the nominal value.

◆ USBPHY_PLL_SIC_DOUBLE_CP

#define USBPHY_PLL_SIC_DOUBLE_CP ( x)

DOUBLE_CP - Doubles the USB PLL charge pump current from the nominal value.

◆ USBPHY_PLL_SIC_HOLD_RING_OFF

#define USBPHY_PLL_SIC_HOLD_RING_OFF ( x)

HOLD_RING_OFF - Disable USB PLL ring oscillator operation 0b0..Allow normal operation of PLL ring oscillator 0b1..Disable PLL ring oscillator

◆ USBPHY_PLL_SIC_PLL_POWER

#define USBPHY_PLL_SIC_PLL_POWER ( x)

PLL_POWER - USB PLL Powerup Control 0b0..Power down 0b1..Allow powerup

◆ USBPHY_PLL_SIC_PLL_ENABLE

#define USBPHY_PLL_SIC_PLL_ENABLE ( x)

PLL_ENABLE - PLL Output Clock Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ USBPHY_PLL_SIC_BYPASS_CLK_SRC

#define USBPHY_PLL_SIC_BYPASS_CLK_SRC ( x)

BYPASS_CLK_SRC - Unused bit field

◆ USBPHY_PLL_SIC_PLL_BYPASS

#define USBPHY_PLL_SIC_PLL_BYPASS ( x)

PLL_BYPASS - Bypass USB PLL 0b0..480 MHz output clock 0b1..Input reference clock

◆ USBPHY_PLL_SIC_CLK_ENABLE_OVERRIDE

#define USBPHY_PLL_SIC_CLK_ENABLE_OVERRIDE ( x)

CLK_ENABLE_OVERRIDE - Enable clock override 0b0..Use PLL_SIC[PLL_ENABLE] and logic to enable/ungate the USB PLL 480 MHz main output 0b1..Unconditionally enable/ungate the USB PLL 480 MHz main output

◆ USBPHY_PLL_SIC_CFM_MODE

#define USBPHY_PLL_SIC_CFM_MODE ( x)

CFM_MODE - Unused bit field

◆ USBPHY_PLL_SIC_REFBIAS_PWD_SEL

#define USBPHY_PLL_SIC_REFBIAS_PWD_SEL ( x)

REFBIAS_PWD_SEL - Reference Bias Power Control 0b0..PLL_POWER internal state signal 0b1..REFBIAS_PWD

◆ USBPHY_PLL_SIC_REFBIAS_PWD

#define USBPHY_PLL_SIC_REFBIAS_PWD ( x)

REFBIAS_PWD - Power Down Reference Bias 0b0..Enable 0b1..Disable or power down

◆ USBPHY_PLL_SIC_PLL_REG_ENABLE

#define USBPHY_PLL_SIC_PLL_REG_ENABLE ( x)

PLL_REG_ENABLE - Enable PLL Regulator 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ USBPHY_PLL_SIC_PLL_DIV_SEL

#define USBPHY_PLL_SIC_PLL_DIV_SEL ( x)

PLL_DIV_SEL - PLL Divider Value Configuration 0b000..Configure for a 32 MHz input clock (divide by 15) 0b001..Configure for a 30 MHz input clock (divide by 16) 0b010..Configure for a 24 MHz input clock (divide by 20) 0b011..Reserved, not usable for USB operation (divide by 22) 0b100..Configure for a 20 MHz input clock (divide by 24) 0b101..Configure for a 19.2 MHz input clock (divide by 25) 0b110..Configure for a 16 MHz input clock (divide by 30) 0b111..Configure for a 12 MHz input clock (divide by 40)

◆ USBPHY_PLL_SIC_PLL_PREDIV

#define USBPHY_PLL_SIC_PLL_PREDIV ( x)

PLL_PREDIV - PLL Pre-Divider 0b0..Uses the undivided reference clock for PLL loop 0b1..Divides the reference clock by two for PLL loop

◆ USBPHY_PLL_SIC_PLL_LOCK

#define USBPHY_PLL_SIC_PLL_LOCK ( x)

PLL_LOCK - USB PLL Lock Status Indicator 0b0..Not locked 0b1..Locked

DOUBLE_LF - Doubles the USB PLL loop filter resistance from the nominal value.

◆ USBPHY_PLL_SIC_TOG_HALF_CP

#define USBPHY_PLL_SIC_TOG_HALF_CP ( x)

HALF_CP - Halves the USB PLL charge pump current from the nominal value.

◆ USBPHY_PLL_SIC_TOG_DOUBLE_CP

#define USBPHY_PLL_SIC_TOG_DOUBLE_CP ( x)

DOUBLE_CP - Doubles the USB PLL charge pump current from the nominal value.

#define USBPHY_PLL_SIC_TOG_HOLD_RING_OFF ( x)

HOLD_RING_OFF - Disable USB PLL ring oscillator operation

PLL_POWER - USB PLL Powerup Control

BYPASS_CLK_SRC - Unused bit field

PLL_REG_ENABLE - Enable PLL Regulator

◆ USBPHY_MISC_HS_USE_EXTERNAL_R

#define USBPHY_MISC_HS_USE_EXTERNAL_R ( x)

HS_USE_EXTERNAL_R - Software method to force UTM reset 0b0..Do not reset the UTM state machines with this bit 0b1..Reset the UTM state machines with this bit

◆ USBPHY_MISC_EN_DEGLITCH

#define USBPHY_MISC_EN_DEGLITCH ( x)

EN_DEGLITCH - Unused bit field

◆ USBPHY_MISC_PLL_REG_DC_LOAD

#define USBPHY_MISC_PLL_REG_DC_LOAD ( x)

PLL_REG_DC_LOAD - Enable the load for the PLL regulator 0b0..Disable the DC load for the PLL regulator 0b1..Enable the DC load for the PLL regulator

◆ USBPHY_MISC_PLL_REG_TRG

#define USBPHY_MISC_PLL_REG_TRG ( x)

PLL_REG_TRG - PLL regulator voltage adjustment 0b00..Set PLL regulator output voltage to 1.1 V 0b01..Set PLL regulator output voltage to 1.05 V 0b10..Set PLL regulator output voltage to 1 V 0b11..Set PLL regulator output voltage to 1.15 V

◆ USBPHY_MISC_RESUME_DONT_QUALIFY_SUSPEND

#define USBPHY_MISC_RESUME_DONT_QUALIFY_SUSPEND ( x)

RESUME_DONT_QUALIFY_SUSPEND - Auto resume logic does not qualify the suspend signal from controller. 0b0..Auto resume logic qualify the suspend signal from controller. 0b1..Auto resume logic does not qualify the suspend signal from controller.

◆ USBPHY_MISC_LOOPBACK_LSTX_SOF

#define USBPHY_MISC_LOOPBACK_LSTX_SOF ( x)

LOOPBACK_LSTX_SOF - Disable the bug fix of LS loopback mode(TKT0574115) 0b0..Enables the bug fix of LS loopback mode(TKT0574115) 0b1..Disables the bug fix of LS loopback mode(TKT0574115)

◆ USBPHY_MISC_EN_SUSPFIX

#define USBPHY_MISC_EN_SUSPFIX ( x)

EN_SUSPFIX - Suspend Fix Enable 0b0..Disables the fix 0b1..Enables the fix

◆ USBPHY_MISC_FS_CLKFRO

#define USBPHY_MISC_FS_CLKFRO ( x)

FS_CLKFRO - Full-Speed Clock FRO 0b0..Disables 0b1..Enables

◆ USBPHY_MISC_RX_HS_DATA

#define USBPHY_MISC_RX_HS_DATA ( x)

RX_HS_DATA - RX_HS_DATA 0b0..DP pin is lower than DM pin in HS Rx 0b1..DP pin is higher than DM pin in HS Rx

◆ USBPHY_MISC_RX_DISCON_DET

#define USBPHY_MISC_RX_DISCON_DET ( x)

RX_DISCON_DET - Rx HS disconnect comparator 0b0..Differential voltage on USB_DP/USB_DM pins is below the Host disconnect threshold 0b1..Differential voltage on USB_DP/USB_DM pins is above the host disconnect threshold

◆ USBPHY_MISC_RX_SQUELCH

#define USBPHY_MISC_RX_SQUELCH ( x)

RX_SQUELCH - Rx Squelch comparator 0b0..Differential voltage on USB_DP/USB_DM pins is above the squelch threshold 0b1..Differential voltage on USB_DP/USB_DM pins is below the squelch threshold

◆ USBPHY_MISC_RX_RXD_FS

#define USBPHY_MISC_RX_RXD_FS ( x)

RX_RXD_FS - FS/LS differential receiver 0b0..DP pin is lower than DM pin in FS/LS Rx 0b1..DP pin is higher than DM pin in FS/LS Rx

◆ USBPHY_MISC_RX_VMIN_FS

#define USBPHY_MISC_RX_VMIN_FS ( x)

RX_VMIN_FS - DM FS single ended Rx state 0b0..The USB_DM pin voltage is <= 0.8 V 0b1..The USB_DM pin voltage is >= 2.0 V

◆ USBPHY_MISC_RX_VPIN_FS

#define USBPHY_MISC_RX_VPIN_FS ( x)

RX_VPIN_FS - DP FS single ended Rx state 0b0..The USB_DP pin voltage is <= 0.8 V 0b1..The USB_DP pin voltage is >= 2.0 V

◆ USBPHY_ANACTRL_PFD_CLK_SEL

#define USBPHY_ANACTRL_PFD_CLK_SEL ( x)

PFD_CLK_SEL - PFD Clock Selection 0b00..USB1PFDCLK = USB PLL reference clock 0b01..USB1PFDCLK = pfd_clk / 4 0b10..USB1PFDCLK frequency = pfd_clk / 2 0b11..USB1PFDCLK = pfd_clk

◆ USBPHY_ANACTRL_SNSBUS_A_SEL

#define USBPHY_ANACTRL_SNSBUS_A_SEL ( x)

SNSBUS_A_SEL - Sensebus signal select for the atx3v_a PHY test pin 0b000..Disconnect the Sensebus A pin from PHY circuits 0b001..Connect the Sensebus A pin to the LVI comparator test input 0b010..Connect the Sensebus A pin to the reference bias 10 uA source 0b011..Connect the Sensebus A pin to the band gap voltage output 0b100..Connect the Sensebus A pin to the PLL bias 10 uA source 0b101..Connect the Sensebus A pin to the PLL voltage regulator output 0b110..Connect the Sensebus A pin to the PLL Vctl loop voltage 0b111..Disconnect the Sensebus A pin from PHY circuits

◆ USBPHY_ANACTRL_SNSBUS_B_SEL

#define USBPHY_ANACTRL_SNSBUS_B_SEL ( x)

SNSBUS_B_SEL - Sensebus signal select for the atx3v_b PHY test pin 0b00..Disconnect the Sensebus B pin from PHY circuits 0b01..Connect the Sensebus A pin to the Rx bias 10 uA sink 0b10..Connect the Sensebus A pin to the Tx bias 10 uA source 0b11..Disconnect the Sensebus B pin from PHY circuits

◆ USBPHY_ANACTRL_DEV_PULLDOWN

#define USBPHY_ANACTRL_DEV_PULLDOWN ( x)

DEV_PULLDOWN - Device Pulldown Enable 0b0..Disable 0b1..Enable

◆ USBPHY_ANACTRL_EMPH_PULSE_CTRL

#define USBPHY_ANACTRL_EMPH_PULSE_CTRL ( x)

EMPH_PULSE_CTRL - Pre-emphasis pulse duration for High-Speed Tx 0b00..Minimum duration of pre-emphasis current after each data transition 0b01..Low medium duration of pre-emphasis current after each data transition 0b10..High medium duration of pre-emphasis current after each data transition 0b11..Maximum duration of pre-emphasis current after each data transition

◆ USBPHY_ANACTRL_EMPH_EN

#define USBPHY_ANACTRL_EMPH_EN ( x)

EMPH_EN - Enables pre-emphasis for the High-Speed TX drivers 0b0..No pre-emphasis is used on HS Tx output drivers 0b1..Enables pre-emphasis for HS Tx output drivers

◆ USBPHY_ANACTRL_EMPH_CUR_CTRL

#define USBPHY_ANACTRL_EMPH_CUR_CTRL ( x)

EMPH_CUR_CTRL - Pre-emphasis current increment for High-Speed Tx 0b00..No pre-emphasis current is enabled for the HS Tx drivers 0b01..One unit of pre-emphasis current is enabled for the HS Tx drivers 0b10..Two units of pre-emphasis current are enabled for the HS Tx drivers 0b11..Three units of pre-emphasis current are enabled for the HS Tx drivers

◆ USBPHY_ANACTRL_TSTI_LS_EN

#define USBPHY_ANACTRL_TSTI_LS_EN ( x)

TSTI_LS_EN - Selects between FS and LS edge rates for TSTI FS/LS Tx drivers 0b0..Use FS edge rate for FS/LS Tx drivers in TSTI test mode 0b1..Use LS edge rate for FS/LS Tx drivers in TSTI test mode

◆ USBPHY_ANACTRL_TSTI_HS_MODE

#define USBPHY_ANACTRL_TSTI_HS_MODE ( x)

TSTI_HS_MODE - Selects between the FS/LS and HS Tx drivers in TSTI test mode 0b0..Enable FS/LS Tx drivers in TSTI test mode 0b1..Enable HS Tx drivers and HS termination in TSTI test mode

◆ USBPHY_ANACTRL_TSTI_HIZ

#define USBPHY_ANACTRL_TSTI_HIZ ( x)

TSTI_HIZ - Disable Tx drivers and terminations in TSTI test mode 0b0..Do not force Tx drivers and terminations into Hi-Z state during TSTI test mode 0b1..Force Tx drivers and terminations into Hi-Z state during TSTI test mode

◆ USBPHY_ANACTRL_TSTI_ENAB

#define USBPHY_ANACTRL_TSTI_ENAB ( x)

TSTI_ENAB - Enables Tx output drivers in TSTI test mode 0b0..Tx output drivers are disabled in TSTI test mode 0b1..Tx output drivers are enabled in TSTI test mode

◆ USBPHY_ANACTRL_TSTI_DP

#define USBPHY_ANACTRL_TSTI_DP ( x)

TSTI_DP - Selects data value for FS/LS USB_DP Tx driver in TSTI test mode 0b0..Force USB_DP pin low with FS Tx driver in TSTI mode 0b1..Force USB_DP pin high with FS Tx driver in TSTI mode

◆ USBPHY_ANACTRL_TSTI_DN

#define USBPHY_ANACTRL_TSTI_DN ( x)

TSTI_DN - Selects data value for FS/LS USB_DM Tx driver in TSTI test mode 0b0..Force USB_DM pin low with FS Tx driver in TSTI mode 0b1..Force USB_DM pin high with FS Tx driver in TSTI mode

◆ USBPHY_ANACTRL_TSTI_TESTMODE

#define USBPHY_ANACTRL_TSTI_TESTMODE ( x)

TSTI_TESTMODE - Enables TSTI test mode path connections for the analog circuits of USBPHY 0b0..TSTI analog test mode paths are disabled 0b1..TSTI analog test mode paths are enabled

◆ USBPHY_ANACTRL_TSTI_SEL

#define USBPHY_ANACTRL_TSTI_SEL ( x)

TSTI_SEL - Control method selector for TSTI test feature inputs 0b0..TSTI interface uses the external pin expose mode inputs 0b1..TSTI interface uses the ANACTRL bit fields for inputs

TSTI_UART_CHL_SEL - Unused bit field

#define USBPHY_LOOPBACK_UTMI_TESTSTART ( x)

UTMI_TESTSTART - USB loopback and related test enable 0b0..Normal USB operation is configured and test modes are disabled 0b1..Loopback, pulse, and pseudorandom test modes are enabled

#define USBPHY_LOOPBACK_TSTI_TX_HS_MODE ( x)

◆ USBPHY_LOOPBACK_TSTI_TX_LS_MODE

#define USBPHY_LOOPBACK_TSTI_TX_LS_MODE ( x)

TSTI_TX_LS_MODE - Select LS mode for USB loopback and related tests 0b0..Control test mode speed with LOOPBACK[TSTI_TX_HS_MODE] 0b1..Force test mode speed to LS
